mapper.select:
select m.id, m.email, m.nickname, m.real_name, m.birth_date, m.bio, m.profile_image, m.role, m.status, m.creator_verified, m.seller_verified, m.creator_tier, m.follower_count, m.following_count, m.gallery_count, m.phone_number as phone, m.last_login_datetime as last_login_at, m.last_activity_datetime as last_activity_at, m.created_datetime as created_at, m.updated_datetime, ( select o.provider from tbl_oauth o where o.member_id = m.id limit 1 ) as social_provider, case when m.creator_verified = true then '작가' else '컬렉터' end as member_type, m.email_verified, m.phone_verified, ( select count(*) from tbl_report r where r.target_type = 'MEMBER' and r.target_id = m.id ) as report_count, ( select count(*) from tbl_payment p where p.buyer_id = m.id and p.status = 'CANCELLED' ) as failed_payment_count, ( select count(*) from tbl_work w where w.member_id = m.id and w.deleted_datetime is null ) as work_count, ( select count(*) from tbl_auction a where a.winner_id = m.id and a.status = 'SOLD' ) as auction_win_count, ( select count(*) from tbl_order o2 where o2.seller_id = m.id and o2.status = 'COMPLETED' ) as sold_count, coalesce(( select sum(o3.total_price) from tbl_order o3 where o3.seller_id = m.id and o3.status = 'COMPLETED' ), 0) as total_transaction_amount, ( select count(*) from tbl_withdrawal_request wr where wr.member_id = m.id and wr.status = 'PENDING' ) as pending_withdrawal_count, ( select to_char(max(o4.completed_at), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') from tbl_order o4 where o4.buyer_id = m.id or o4.seller_id = m.id ) as last_transaction_date, ( select count(*) from tbl_payment p where p.buyer_id = m.id and p.status = 'REFUNDED' ) as refund_count, ( select count(*) from tbl_member_restriction mr where mr.member_id = m.id ) as suspension_count
from tbl_member m where m.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_member set status = #{status}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
